question: Run anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days and summarize any persistent abnormal periods.
effective_question: Run anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days and summarize any persistent abnormal periods.
answer: The anomaly detection on transformer T-019's winding temperature for the past 7 days identified 10 anomalies, with an anomaly rate of 1.39%. A persistent abnormal period was found from January 22, 2024, to January 29, 2024, with a stable direction and a mean winding temperature of 103.3018°C.
